# FA506IV fTPM Fix

https://github.com/Hesamsamani/fa506iv-ftpm-fix

ASUS TUF Gaming A15 FA506IV, BIOS FA506IV.320, AMD fTPM 3.42.0.5 fails Call of Duty Warzone attestation (AMD PA-420, pattern 3.*.0.*).

## Current release: v1.1.0 (v1.0.0 withdrawn)

Full PSP trustlet replacement → fTPM version class 3.42.2.5 (not 3.*.0.*).
Windows installer only (EZ Flash rejects modified ROMs).

Download: https://github.com/Hesamsamani/fa506iv-ftpm-fix/releases/latest

Post-flash: Clear TPM (post_flash_tpm.ps1), reboot, rerun Activision Secure Attestation Wizard.

Stock SHA-256: DC7E5984FB4A39DE84204F54F6D8A95B04DFECDF3AA32D45D0AA904272AD3273
Patched v3 SHA-256: 37ED09073A01F2C6892603231BC9AB72164734ADD9D1D78A4D58E60E2049C316
